body.title: Register memory_search as direct tool
body.result: Added memory_search(query,limit=5) as registered sync tool in memory_query.py — Igor can now look up his own memories in-turn without a deferred task. Calls cortex.search(), formats results as readable string.
body.description: Igor has no sync in-turn way to search his own memories; register memory_search(query) in tool registry so it is callable without a deferred task
